## What problem does this solve?

## What would it do?

Describe the workflow — what goes in, what comes out.

## Alternatives you've considered

Have you tried doing this another way? What fell short?

## Out of scope?

Pixeltamer stays focused on **image generation**. HTML reconstruction, browser screenshot validation, design-system management, and full design pipelines belong elsewhere.

- [ ] This is image generation, not adjacent territory.
